name: ams-control-plane
description: Repo-local MCP surface for AMS task, goal, project, and capability operations.

interface.shortDescription: Use AMS task, goal, and project operations through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Local MCP bridge for the Agent Management System control plane. Exposes task, goal, project, and capability discovery tools backed by the existing bearer-token API.
defaultPrompt: Create or update AMS tasks from MCP.
